ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, CCS_Account__c <> null, OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Assign_To__c, 'Goeasy'), NOT(CCS_Account__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = 'GoEasy_CCS_Account') ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Assign_To__c, 'Flexiti'), NOT(CCS_Account__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Flexiti_CCS_Account') ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Wrong Assign To for given CCS Account
